Add-Type -AssemblyName PresentationInteropServices
$HWND = [System.Windows.Forms.NativeMethods]::FindWindow($null, "abc")

}

4. If the window is not found, it outputs a message indicating that the window was not found.

Make sure you have the necessary permissions and that the window titled "abc" exists before running this script.

# Import the necessary assembly for window manipulation

function Set-ResizableWindow {

    $windows = [System.Windows.Window]::GetWindows() | Where-Object { $_.Title -eq $WindowTitle }

    }
